channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Roki Sasaki pulled from Dodger Stadium debut in 2nd inning after more struggles with his control
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Roki Sasaki's career with the Los Angeles Dodgers is not off to a sensational start. For a young pitcher who's been a dominant force at every other step in his meteoric baseball career, that's both a surprise and a challenge.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: USC shakes off JuJu Watkins' absence and beats Kansas State 67-61 in March Madness
item.description: SPOKANE, Ore. (AP) — Freshman Kennedy Smith stepped into the void left by injured star JuJu Watkins, scoring 19 points to help Southern California hold off Kansas State 67-61 in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ilia Malinin cruises to 2nd straight title to cap an American gold rush at figure skating worlds
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ilia Malinin walked toward the ice for his free skate at the world championships with the swagger of a conquering hero. Then he backed up the bravado.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani ramps up throwing program, but Roberts says MVP isn't close to mound debut for Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani threw his first bullpen session in a month on Saturday, but the reigning NL MVP still has plenty of work to do before he takes the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bueckers has career-high 40 to lead one-woman March Madness rout for UConn, 82-59 over Oklahoma
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Paige Bueckers scored a career-high 40 points, rescuing UConn from its first-half doldrums and single-handedly turning a tight game against Oklahoma into an 82-59 rout on Saturday that sent the Huskies to the Elite Eight of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka beats Jessica Pegula in Miami Open final for 19th tour title
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka entered the Miami Open final against Jessica Pegula with 18 career titles on her elite resume. The Miami Open crown had proved elusive until Saturday. The No.
item.dc:creator: MARC BERMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Madison Booker and top-seeded Texas outlast SEC rival Tennessee 67-59 to reach Elite Eight
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Texas coach Vic Schaefer got the tense battle he expected between his defensive-minded Longhorns and the highest-scoring team in the country in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees record historic inning with home runs on three consecutive pitches
item.description: The New York Yankees had a historic first inning against the Milwaukee Brewers on Saturday, as they hit four home runs for the first time in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GM says firing Grizzlies' coach with 9 games left his decision and in team's best interests
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Memphis general manager Zach Kleiman said Saturday the decision to fire coach Taylor Jenkins with nine games remaining in the regular season with the franchise firmly in the playoff chase was “mine and mine only" and in the Grizzlies' best interests.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USC coach Lindsay Gottlieb defends Mississippi State player amid online harassment over JuJu Watkins' injury
item.description: USC head coach Lindsay Gottlieb came to the defense of a Mississippi State player as she faces online bullying over her involvement in the play that resulted in JuJu Watkins' injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 9th-inning homer lifts Rays over Rockies 3-2 in Steinbrenner Field opener
item.description: Rookie Kameron Misner led off the ninth inning with his first major league home run, giving Tampa Bay a 3-2 win over the Colorado Rockies on Friday as the Rays began their season of home games at Steinbrenner Field.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Rays prepare for Tampa home opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Tampa Bay Rays have their home opener for their season at Steinbrenner Field on Friday. The game is already a sell out. Seating capacity at this years games will be greatly reduced, due to major hurricane damage at Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Softball: Bonita Vista 3, Mission Hills 1
item.description: A competitive softball matchup between Bonita Vista and Mission Hills in the Mater Dei Invitational at Palomar College.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Stanford football coach Troy Taylor fired after allegations
item.description: (KRON) -- Stanford football head coach Troy Taylor has been fired, team officials announced Tuesday, following a report that he was investigated twice for allegedly mistreating staffers.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Utah's playoff hopes take big hit with 5-1 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The playoff hopes of the Utah Hockey Club are growing dimmer after a 5-1 loss to the Detroit Red Wings Monday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
